text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert is a hit! Students<n>and fans
alike give their emotions<n>free rein, creating
unforgettable<n>memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello watches from beside the<n>stage with an
affectionate and<n>contented smile, her vision finally
having come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Backstage, girls exchange high fives<n>as they rush
out into the welcoming<n>arms of their fans.
